title: Golden Green Mexican Chicken Pozole with Dulce de Leche Toppings
description: A flavorful and nutritious Mexican dish featuring sashimi-cut chicken breast, paleo-friendly green tomatillo broth, and sweet dulce de leche toppings.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Roast the poblano peppers by placing them directly on the stovetop and charring them on all sides.
Peel the roasted poblano peppers by removing the charred skin, then chop them into small pieces.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot and sauté until softened.
Add the diced green tomatillos, chicken broth, and roasted poblano peppers to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the sashimi-cut chicken breast to the pot and simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and lime juice.
Season the pozole with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pozole hot, topped with dulce de leche, chopped cilantro, and a sprinkle of lime zest.
Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges, if desired.

axes.dishForm: Pozole with Dulce de Leche Toppings
